annual_rate.notes: Prejudgment interest under SDCL 21-1-13.1 — 10% (simple interest). This is PREjudgment interest (accruing before entry of judgment) and is separate from South Dakota’s post-judgment rate; availability is limited by claim type (see the page). Current formula value as of 2026-07-09; verify at sdlegislature.gov. Not legal advice.
